response.justification: While the candidate exceeds the minimum qualification (Bachelor's + 14 years experience) and demonstrates strong software engineering fundamentals, the role requires deep specialization in hardware systems, SoC/IP modeling, GPU architecture, and AI accelerator optimization. The candidate's experience is exclusively in web/backend/application software with no background in hardware design, systems architecture at the silicon level, or deep learning workload optimization—a fundamental domain mismatch that cannot be bridged in a principal-level hire.
strengths: Exceeds minimum qualification threshold with Bachelor's degree and 14+ years of technical experience
Strong software engineering fundamentals demonstrated through TDD, CI/CD practices, and performance optimization across multiple systems
Proven adaptability across diverse programming languages and technical domains (D, C++, TypeScript, Node.js)
concerns: Zero experience with SoC/IP modeling, hardware design, or silicon-level systems—core competencies for the role
Career entirely in web/backend/application software with no background in GPU architecture, AI accelerators, or hardware-software co-design
Missing all preferred qualifications: no SIMD/MIMD architecture experience, no deep learning workload optimization, no GPU architecture analysis

key_factors.factor: Absence of AI accelerator/GPU architecture background
